{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206222374397504A5C588F31B5C"}"},"total":258},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529525598906139454","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，剧情爽度也够，每日能两更，高低得给作者五星好评的，实际评分应该在8.5以上接近9，支持作者，长久下去应该就有9的评分了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753108494,"group_id":"7509050727231130686","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NytmmMlRgM7RwjqE9r9aiA4tMrK3O6neMqj3eyvY06Fq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4446034075333437","user_name":"挚爱小湘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4446034075333437","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509050727231130686","book_info":{"abstract":"顶上前夕，身为白胡子海贼团船员的夏洛猛然惊醒，然后就震惊的发现，距离白团的灭顶之灾已经不远了。
他几乎已经能够预见未来，这支海贼团的下场。
白胡子陨落，四皇团之一的巅峰海贼团土崩瓦解。
为了阻止这一切的发生，夏洛决定，利用一切力量，成长为四皇级强者。
然后，继承白胡子海贼团。
不久后，顶上战争中，当那道伟岸的身影重重倒下后。
夏洛高举拳头，响亮的话语传遍马林梵多。
“此刻起，白胡子的一切将由我来继承！”
黑红色霸气闪电劈落，整个世界为之震惊。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/903a8fa25f60aaf43f49167b0b7802e5","author":"药石","author_id":"","book_id":"7509050727231130686","book_name":"海贼：我以五皇之姿，降临顶上","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7509050778032554558","read_count":"28725","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"809320"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.3","serial_count":"385","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,系统,穿越,二次元,海贼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3cf79a9e001d2e253664303ea48e49e9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779315743&x-signature=mn7tTal1hskyTeG4IKoj66byyik%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102227308971","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"79"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206222374397504A5C588F31B5C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_co
